mapper.select: SELECT session_id, conversation_id, status, assigned_agent_id, created_at, updated_at, last_activity_at FROM session WHERE session_id = #{sessionId}::uuid

SELECT session_id, conversation_id, status, assigned_agent_id, created_at, updated_at, last_activity_at FROM session WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId}::uuid AND status IN ('AI_HANDLING', 'HUMAN_HANDLING') ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT session_id, conversation_id, status, assigned_agent_id, created_at, updated_at, last_activity_at FROM session WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId}::uuid ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT session_id, conversation_id, status, assigned_agent_id, created_at, updated_at, last_activity_at FROM session WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT session_id, conversation_id, status, assigned_agent_id, created_at, updated_at, last_activity_at FROM session WHERE assigned_agent_id = #{agentId} AND status IN ('AI_HANDLING', 'HUMAN_HANDLING') ORDER BY last_activity_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO session (session_id, conversation_id, status, assigned_agent_id, created_at, updated_at, last_activity_at) VALUES (#{sessionId}::uuid, #{conversationId}::uuid, #{status}, #{assignedAgentId}, NOW(), NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE session SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE session_id = #{sessionId}::uuid
UPDATE session SET last_activity_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE session_id = #{sessionId}::uuid
UPDATE session SET assigned_agent_id = #{agentId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE session_id = #{sessionId}::uuid
UPDATE session SET status = 'CLOSED', updated_at = NOW() WHERE status IN ('AI_HANDLING', 'HUMAN_HANDLING') AND last_activity_at < NOW() - (#{timeoutMinutes} || ' minutes')::interval
